remaining_findings.note: Admin middleware added but full role-based auth system requires architectural implementation.
Admin token guard added, but full ownership checks require session/JWT auth system.

changes: CWE-89: All 6 SQL queries converted to parameterized statements
CWE-78: os.system() replaced with subprocess.run(list args)
CWE-78: subprocess shell=True replaced with explicit arg list
CWE-79: HTML f-string responses replaced with jsonify()
CWE-22: Path traversal protection with realpath() + bounds check
CWE-284: Admin endpoint now requires X-Admin-Token header
CWE-209: Error handlers no longer expose stack traces
CWE-942: CORS wildcard replaced with explicit origin allowlist
CWE-200: Server binds to 127.0.0.1 instead of 0.0.0.0
Security headers added: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection
CWE-798: All hardcoded secrets replaced with os.environ.get()
CWE-16: DEBUG defaults to False, read from FLASK_DEBUG env var
CWE-352: SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=True, SESSION_COOKIE_HTTPONLY=True
CWE-327: MD5 password hashing replaced with bcrypt
CWE-330: random.randint replaced with secrets.token_hex()
CWE-22: Path traversal in file utility protected with realpath()
CWE-502: pickle.loads() removed entirely, replaced with json.loads()
CWE-89: All 6 SQL queries converted to parameterized statements
CWE-78: exec() replaced with execFile() with validated arg list
CWE-95: eval() removed, replaced with regex-validated safe math
CWE-22: Path traversal protection with path.resolve() + bounds check
CWE-79: HTML template literals replaced with res.json()
CWE-918: SSRF protection — URL validated against internal IP blocklist
CWE-284: Admin routes protected with requireAdmin middleware
CWE-639: Profile endpoint gated behind admin auth (partial fix)
CWE-502: yaml.load replaced with yaml.safeLoad
CWE-330: Math.random() replaced with crypto.randomBytes(32)
CWE-200: /debug/info endpoint removed entirely
CWE-200: Server binds to 127.0.0.1 instead of 0.0.0.0
CWE-798: All hardcoded credentials removed, load from process.env
Security headers added to all responses
